Yuzu.notes: Mixed scanner coverage, but source validation currently compares DB-backed slice only.

Reservoir.notes: Current export is scanner-owned; raw DB totals are not a reliable parity target.

Makina.notes: DB-backed wallet set with standard export parity checks.

InfiniFi.notes: Protocol API positions plus scanner-derived lending positions. API validation should only target protocol_api slice.

Upshift.notes: DB-backed wallet set with standard export parity checks.

Midas.notes: DB-backed wallet set with standard export parity checks.

Superform.notes: Current export is scanner-owned; raw DB totals are not a reliable parity target.

Re Protocol.notes: On-chain wallets plus separate off-chain reserve position.

Pareto.notes: Derived from on-chain allocation plus API APY enrichment, exported as protocol_api slice.
